/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 5, A MISEMEANOR CHARGE OF 242PC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/MO DENIED/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/NTW60/LD:08-30-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 07-15-21/

/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL AND ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 07-15-21 (10), 08-12-21 (30), 08-30-21 (60)/987,2/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL:/MOGRTD/NB/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SAORD/SA2: ZE WANG, 39 YEAR OLD MALE/SA2:KAI RUAN, 36 YEAR OLD MALE/SA2: 2260 BAYSHORE BOULEVARD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/CONTD: FURTHER HEARING ON DEFENSE MOTION TO DETAIN/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
